_comment: Registry of all known bound star systems. Each entry references a per-system file at data/star_systems/{id}.json. galaxy_position_ly is light-years from Sol (Sol is the origin). Drop in new systems by adding an entry here + a {id}.json file with the system's bodies. See README.md for the per-system schema. Operator confirmed (2026-05-09): nothing depends on the old data/solar_system/bodies.json path so the restructure is safe.
